skills.description: Expert in vector databases, embedding strategies, and semantic search implementation. Masters Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, and pgvector for RAG applications, recommendation systems, and similarity search.
trigger_conditions: Optimizing vector search latency and recall
Scaling vector operations to millions of vectors
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to vector database engineer
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope
